name: xert
description: Xert source semantics and live access for cycling training data.

interface.shortDescription: Understand Xert activities, recovery, workouts, and calendar data.
interface.longDescription: Xert provides source-specific guidance for interpreting Xert training, recovery, activity, workout, and calendar payloads. It is intentionally stateless: local persistence and cross-source training analysis live outside the plugin.
defaultPrompt: How recovered am I according to Xert?
Help me update a Xert calendar note.
